name: Lever
description: Lever is a modern recruiting and applicant tracking platform. The API provides programmatic access to opportunities (candidates in pipeline), job postings, interviews, notes, offers, stages, and users. Use it to automate recruiting workflows, sync candidate data with external systems, and manage the full hiring pipeline.

capabilities.name: opportunities_list
capabilities.description: List all candidate opportunities (pipeline entries) with filtering by stage, source, tag, and date.

capabilities.name: opportunities_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_create
capabilities.description: Create a new candidate opportunity. Can include contact info, tags, sources, and posting assignment.

capabilities.name: opportunities_deleted_list
capabilities.description: List all deleted opportunities.

capabilities.name: opportunities_stage_update
capabilities.description: Move an opportunity to a different pipeline stage.

capabilities.name: opportunities_archived_update
capabilities.description: Archive or unarchive an opportunity with a reason.

capabilities.name: opportunities_links_add
capabilities.description: Add links (portfolio, LinkedIn, etc.) to an opportunity's contact.

capabilities.name: opportunities_tags_add
capabilities.description: Add tags to an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_sources_add
capabilities.description: Add sources to an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_notes_list
capabilities.description: List all notes on an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_notes_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific note.

capabilities.name: opportunities_interviews_list
capabilities.description: List all interviews for an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_interviews_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing interview.

capabilities.name: opportunities_offers_list
capabilities.description: List all offers for an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_referrals_list
capabilities.description: List all referrals for an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_resumes_list
capabilities.description: List all resumes for an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_files_list
capabilities.description: List all files attached to an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_files_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file to an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_feedback_create
capabilities.description: Submit interview feedback for an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_forms_list
capabilities.description: List all profile forms for an opportunity.

capabilities.name: opportunities_panels_create
capabilities.description: Create an interview panel for an opportunity.

capabilities.name: postings_list
capabilities.description: List all job postings. Note: use the public postings API at /v0/postings/{site} for public listings.

capabilities.name: postings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific posting.

capabilities.name: postings_create
capabilities.description: Create a new job posting.

capabilities.name: postings_apply_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve application form fields for a posting.

capabilities.name: contacts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific contact's details.

capabilities.name: stages_list
capabilities.description: List all pipeline stages.

capabilities.name: stages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific pipeline stage.

capabilities.name: archive_reasons_list
capabilities.description: List all archive reasons.

capabilities.name: sources_list
capabilities.description: List all sources.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: List all tags used in the account.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: List all users in the Lever account. Note: this endpoint is not officially documented but available via API.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific user.

capabilities.name: users_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user.

capabilities.name: users_deactivate
capabilities.description: Deactivate a user.

capabilities.name: requisitions_list
capabilities.description: List all requisitions.

capabilities.name: requisitions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific requisition.

capabilities.name: form_templates_list
capabilities.description: List all active profile form templates.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook subscription.

capabilities.name: uploads_create
capabilities.description: Upload a file temporarily for use with the apply endpoint.
